title: System Guidance
subtitle: Everything a new operator needs to understand this platform — in under 5 minutes.

liveActivity.title: Live Activity Now
liveActivity.desc: Real-time event feed merging risk checks, orders, and notifications. Use filters to focus on what matters.

flow.title: How the System Works
flow.subtitle: Market data enters on the left and travels through each stage before an order is placed.
flow.hoverHint: Hover any step to see what can go wrong.

ingestor.label: Data Ingestor
ingestor.desc: Receives live price ticks from Binance exchange.
ingestor.risk: If disconnected, no market data flows to any downstream service.

analyzer.label: Analyzer
analyzer.desc: Computes RSI, moving averages, and price momentum.
analyzer.risk: Stale or missing ticks produce incorrect indicators and bad signals.

strategy.label: Strategy
strategy.desc: Evaluates indicator signals to find trade opportunities.
strategy.risk: False signals generate low-quality orders that burden risk checks.

riskguard.label: Risk Guard
riskguard.desc: Validates every order against safety rules before it proceeds.
riskguard.risk: Rule violations block the order and log a rejection event.

executor.label: Executor
executor.desc: Places orders on Binance, or simulates fills in paper trading mode.
executor.risk: API errors or network issues can delay or miss order fills.

notifier.label: Notifier
notifier.desc: Sends Telegram alerts for trades, rejections, and system events.
notifier.risk: Silent failures leave operators unaware of problems in real time.

rules.title: Rules & Safety
rules.subtitle: Active rules enforced by Risk Guard before every order. Each card shows the current state and impact if the rule is violated.

maxDrawdown.label: Max Drawdown
maxDrawdown.meaning: Limits total portfolio loss for the day. If losses reach this threshold, all trading stops automatically.
maxDrawdown.impact: All trading halts until the drawdown resets at the next period.

maxPositionSize.label: Max Position Size
maxPositionSize.meaning: No single order can use more than this percentage of the virtual account balance.
maxPositionSize.impact: Oversized orders are rejected before reaching the exchange.

minRiskReward.label: Min Risk/Reward
minRiskReward.meaning: A trade must offer at least this ratio of potential gain vs potential loss before it is allowed.
minRiskReward.impact: Low-quality signals are blocked before any order is placed.

cooldown.label: Cooldown Period
cooldown.meaning: Prevents over-trading by requiring a pause between consecutive orders on the same symbol.
cooldown.impact: Orders placed too quickly after a prior trade are rejected during cooldown.

tradingMode.label: Trading Mode
tradingMode.paperMeaning: Paper trading is active — orders are fully simulated. No real money is at risk.
tradingMode.liveMeaning: Live trading is active — orders are sent to Binance using real funds.
tradingMode.paperImpact: Enable live mode in configuration to trade with real funds.
tradingMode.liveImpact: Every approved order uses real money. Verify rules before deploying.

maxOrderValue.label: Max Order Value
maxOrderValue.meaning: Each individual order is capped at this notional value, regardless of position size percentage.
maxOrderValue.impact: Orders above this value are blocked even if the position size % is within limits.

campaign.title: 4-Hour Session-Locked Campaign
campaign.subtitle: Intraday campaign mode with strict session boundaries and mandatory end-of-session liquidation.

mustHave.1: All trading is split into six independent 4-hour sessions each day.
mustHave.2: Every position opened in a session must be fully closed before that session ends.
mustHave.3: No order, trade, or position is allowed to carry across session boundaries.
mustHave.4: New position opens are blocked in the final 30 minutes of each session.
mustHave.5: The final 30 minutes are liquidation-only and must end with flat exposure.

campaign.documentsHint: Latest campaign and implementation references tracked in this repository:

health.title: Current System Health
health.subtitle: Traffic-light status based on data freshness from each service probe.
health.legend: 🟢 Healthy — data received within the last 2 minutes.  🟡 Degraded — last seen 2–10 minutes ago.  🔴 Attention — no data for 10+ minutes or an error occurred.

riskGuard.name: Risk Guard
riskGuard.desc: Validates orders against all risk rules via gRPC.

notifier.name: Notifier
notifier.desc: Sends Telegram alerts for trade events and system status.

ingestorAnalyzerStrategy.name: Ingestor / Analyzer / Strategy
ingestorAnalyzerStrategy.desc: Streams price ticks, computes signals, and generates trade ideas.

executor.name: Executor
executor.desc: Places orders on Binance or simulates fills in paper mode.

checklist.title: What Should I Do Next?
checklist.subtitle: Guided actions for new operators getting started with this platform.

readFlow.title: Read the system flow
readFlow.desc: Scroll up to "How the System Works" to understand the data pipeline from tick to trade.

checkRules.title: Check risk rules before going live
checkRules.desc: Verify drawdown limit, position size, and cooldown values are set correctly.

reviewSignals.title: Review active trading signals
reviewSignals.desc: See live signals and recent orders across all trading pairs.

browseHistory.title: Browse event history
browseHistory.desc: Inspect every system event: approvals, rejections, and notifications.

viewOverview.title: View the dashboard overview
viewOverview.desc: Check today's P&L, drawdown usage, and market sentiment at a glance.

contactOncall.title: Contact on-call if status is red
contactOncall.desc: If any service shows a red health indicator above, escalate to the on-call operator immediately.
